violations.text: Raw animal foods (raw chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024

(Chili sauce) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

Working containers of (dry ingredients) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The door to the outside, located in the (back storage area), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
Splash guard needed between kitchen hand sink and prep table area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
Various food product observed being stored in plastic bags. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces observed with debris: 1) Stove hood vents observed with debris and grease buildup, 2)Chest freezers exterior has soil and food residue, debris, and or ice buildup, 3)Blenders have food debris, 4)Food storage shelves and bins observed with soil and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
Mop bucket observed with stagnate water. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items (clutter) were observed in the (back storage-kitchen) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

Employees were observed handling money and changing gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (immersion blender) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

(Beef) was observed held at (119-120 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Beef was reheated to 175 DF during inspection Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

(Packaged Sausage ) was observed held at (50-53) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

(Various food product) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
Employees' medicines were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

(Beef Jerky) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

Working containers of (dry ingredients ) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The door to the outside, located in the (back storage area ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
Splashguard needed between the kitchen hand sink and the prep table area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
(Bagged Carrots ) were observed stored on the floor in the (front counter area ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
(Deli Display unit ) located in the (front counter ) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures observed at 53DF. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces observed with debris: 1.stove top, wok area, pots, and stove hoods observed with debris and grease buildup. 2.all refrigerators and freezers interior and exterior has soil and food residue, debris, and/or ice buildup. 3.blenders has food debris. 4.food storage shelves and bins observed with soil and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
Mop bucket observed with stagnant water. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
The door frame in the back storage and floors in kitchen are missing tiles area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
The ceiling in the (front prep) area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The ceiling in kitchen and back storage area is in poor repair. Observed paint peeling, water stains, ceiling in back storage not properly covered The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The floors , walls, and bathroom door(kitchen) throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items(clutter) were observed in the (back kitchen ) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
The refrigerator and back storage is lacking low intensity and/or non functioning lighting. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
